critical_issues.issue: Type mismatch - passing objects to functions expecting IMessage[]
Still uses IMessage types - incomplete migration
Function signature still expects IMessage[] parameter

build_errors: TS2345: Argument of type '{ role: string | undefined; content: string; }[]' is not assignable to parameter of type 'IMessage[]'
Type 'string | undefined' is not assignable to type 'string'
Type 'undefined' is not assignable to type 'string'
summary: Migration from Phase 34 is incomplete. OpenAIProvider was updated to use Content[] but supporting infrastructure (ConversationCache, estimateMessagesTokens) still expects IMessage[], causing type incompatibility and build failures.
recommendations: Complete migration by updating ConversationCache to work with Content[]
Update estimateMessagesTokens to accept Content[] or create adapter functions
Remove all remaining IMessage imports and references
Run full test suite after build passes
